data.title: 'Dumpster Fire'—Cybersecurity Analyst: 'My Team At A 300K-Employee Firm Being Replaced By An AI We've Been Secretly Training For 2 Years'
Private Employment Beats Expectations In March As Labor Market Shrugs Off Tariff Worries
data.description: Private sector job growth exceeded expectations in March, with 155,000 jobs added and a notable pickup from February. Service and goods sectors both saw gains, while wages and market reactions are positive.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Conagra Brands Stock Ahead Of Q3 Earnings
Ryanair Soars Past 200 Million Passengers In One Year, Sets New European Record In Air Travel
data.description: Ryanair flew 200.2 million passengers in one year, a 9% increase and a record for a European airline. CEO welcomes 200 millionth passenger.

data.title: Senior DOJ Advisor And Ex-Elon Musk Employee Reportedly Suspected Of Past Cybercrimes: Pam Bondi Expresses 'Full Trust And Confidence' In Him
data.description: A senior advisor at the U.S. Justice Department (DoJ), previously employed at Elon Musk's companies, has been implicated in hacking and distributing pirated software.
